name: Aithericon Loki Error-Log Alert
description: Scheduled error-log email alert for the Aithericon cluster: Cron (every 12h) → Loki query for error/fatal/panic lines → Agent incident summary → Decision (email only if errors found) → SMTP send. The agent uses Hugging Face Inference (provider: openai, resource hf_inference, model Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) billed to the `Aithericon` HF org via X-HF-Bill-To — the same agent binding as the suessco sibling. `send_alert` sets retryPolicy.maxRetries 0 to avoid an email storm on the single-use SMTP secret. Requires workspace resources `aithericon_loki` (loki), `hf_inference` (openai), and `mail` (smtp) — all auto-seeded from demos/resources/; swap `mail` for a real relay for production use.
